name: get_posts
description: Retrieve posts authored by a specific member or organization, with pagination and sorting options. Returns post content, timestamps, visibility, and lifecycle state.

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: URL-encoded URN of the author to retrieve posts for (e.g., urn%3Ali%3Aperson%3AyrZCpj2Z12).

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Query type. Must be set to 'author' when finding posts by author.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of posts to return per page. Default is 10, maximum is 100.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Index of the first item for pagination. Default is 0.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order: LAST_MODIFIED or CREATED, in descending order.

elements.author: urn:li:organization:2414183
elements.commentary: Excited to announce our latest release!
